title: phaseolus angustifolius
intro: Phaseolus angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved kidney bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving blood sugar control, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
